description: As part of the month-end close, an accountant needs to reconcile the main corporate bank account, matching transactions in the general ledger to the bank statement.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the general ledger transactions for the bank account for the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls all GL entries for the cash account.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the bank statement for the same period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves the official bank statement.

nodes.task_description: Automatically match transactions between the GL and the bank statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's tool matches over 95% of transactions automatically.

nodes.task_description: Identify and list any reconciling items, such as outstanding checks or deposits in transit, and prepare the final reconciliation report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies all reconciling items and generates a balanced reconciliation report.
